emailSubjectTemplate: Professional Website & Mobile App Development for {{businessName}}
emailBodyTemplate:
Hi {{businessName}},

I hope you are doing well.

My name is Nirbhay Kumar from 90skids.digital, a premium website and app development agency. 

I was looking at businesses in {{location}} and found {{businessName}}. I noticed that your business either doesn't have a modern website or has an unoptimized online presence. In today's digital world, a fast, gorgeous, mobile-responsive website helps you stand out, build trust, and gain 2x to 3x more local customers.

We specialize in high-conversion websites and mobile applications tailored for businesses like yours. You can explore our work and details here: https://90skids.digital

If you'd like a custom proposal or a quick talk about how we can build a stellar digital presence for {{businessName}}, please reply to this email or message me directly on WhatsApp at +91 7717766958.

Warm regards,

Nirbhay Kumar
Founder, 90skids.digital
